Enumeration Case# kUSBInformationDeviceIsInternalBit

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.6+

```
kUSBInformationDeviceIsInternalBit = 2
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/usbdeviceinformationbits/kusbinformationdeviceisinternalbit#discussion)

The USB device is internal to the enclosure (all the hubs it attaches to are captive)
